meta.title: Chronell — Manage your time, not your inbox
meta.description: Chronell is not an email client. It's a system to manage your time — Microsoft 365 and Google in one calm desktop workspace for Windows 11.

hero.tagline: Stop managing your inbox. Start managing your time.
hero.positioning: Chronell is not an email client. It's a system to manage your time.
hero.subline: Microsoft 365 and Google in one calm desktop workspace — local search, workflow triage, unified calendar. Built for Windows 11.

quote.text: Your inbox is not a workplace.

method.title: A system to turn time into progress
method.idea: Most people manage emails. With Chronell, you manage your time.
method.oneliner: The Chronell Method turns your inbox into a timeline.
method.builtIn: The method isn't theory — it's built into the app you use every day.

capture.title: Capture
capture.subtitle: Everything in one place
capture.b1: Email, tasks, notes and events belong together — not in separate apps.
capture.b2: No tab chaos. No context switching.
capture.app: Eight modules, M365 + Google, meta-folders, global search.

decide.title: Decide
decide.subtitle: Turn input into action
decide.b1: Every input becomes a decision: do it, plan it, delay it, or archive it.
decide.b2: Your inbox is a decision point — not a warehouse.
decide.app: Mail to-dos, snooze, waiting-for, quick steps, triage folders.

plan.title: Plan
plan.subtitle: Time is the real resource
plan.b1: Tasks are meaningless without time — everything gets time, context, priority.
plan.b2: One calendar for appointments, mail tasks, cloud tasks and notes.
plan.app: Unified calendar, timeline view, due-date buckets.

execute.title: Execute
execute.subtitle: Work in blocks, not chaos
execute.b1: Work happens in focused time blocks — not between emails.
execute.b2: Your system becomes plannable, calm, controllable.
execute.app: All Work module with list and kanban by due date.

compare.title: Outlook shows messages. Chronell shows what matters.

claims.c1: Outlook shows you messages. Chronell shows you what matters.
claims.c3: Emails are input. Time is what matters.
claims.c4: Work doesn't happen in your inbox. It happens in your calendar.

table.focusC: Workflow: to-dos, snooze, rules, one desktop
table.weightT: Full Office web or heavy suites

compare.disclaimer: Chronell is not a replacement for every enterprise Outlook or Exchange admin scenario. Strengths: workflow, local data, multi-provider, modern UI for power users.

triage.title: Decide — mail triage
triage.body: Turn messages into to-dos with due buckets. Auto folders for in progress and done. Snooze, waiting-for, and one-click quick steps.

calendar.title: Plan — unified calendar
calendar.body: Microsoft and Google calendars plus mail to-dos, cloud tasks, and scheduled notes — with a timeline view for your day.

accounts.title: Capture — all accounts
accounts.body: Every mailbox in one window. Meta-folders across accounts. Global search with Ctrl+K over local full-text index.

grid.workDesc: Mail to-dos and cloud tasks in list or kanban
grid.notesDesc: Notes on mail, events, and standalone pages
grid.peopleDesc: Contacts cached locally from M365 and Google
grid.privacyDesc: SQLite on your device — OAuth to providers only

trust.title: Your data stays with you
trust.oauth: Sign in via official Microsoft and Google OAuth flows
trust.local: Mail and metadata in local SQLite — search via FTS5
trust.platform: Windows 11 desktop (Electron) — Microsoft 365 and Google only, no IMAP

footer.tagline: Chronell is not a tool. It's a calm place for your work.
footer.author: Kurt Soeser

cta.title: Ready for calmer work?
cta.body: Chronell is in active development for Windows 11. Join the waitlist — we'll notify you when a beta is ready.
